feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Im looking for a bento box, it cant be pinku (thats japanese for pink) or any gi…
entry.content: Im looking for a bento box, it cant be pinku (thats japanese for pink) or any girl color. It has to be of 2 or more kotoba (thats japanese for 2 compartments) and has be be chibi (small) sized. And has to be really kawaii (cute). Also It has to be about 10-20 bux. And you have to post pics of it first (i want to make shure it's kawaii (cute)). And it would be nice if it came with matching chopstick holder (WITH chopsticks). OH! and it CANNOT have any cartoon pictures, or be made out of plastic.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: How are all you XBONE/PS4 players doing?
entry.content: I've been recently playing GT7 on my PS4 Pro. Game runs fine and I'm not paying $500 for slightly better performance and visuals. I also enjoy some Minecraft and Dark Souls 3. How are your Xbone's and PS4's holding up? And what games are you playing currently?

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Is the self eternal, or non-existent? Why are there such vastly contrasting view…
entry.content: Is the self eternal, or non-existent? Why are there such vastly contrasting views on such a fundamental aspect? It just seems like, really, we know nothing. And this shit is all just made up. What is the point of living? Why are we here? Where are we going? Why is the universe so vast and empty? Why do we die?

Wonderful. Some how a biker managed to die outside my house las

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: hello everyone many of you have come to love my fruits of Runescape threads. I h…
entry.content: hello everyone many of you have come to love my fruits of Runescape threads. I had a lot of fun posting them and seeing everyone's thoughts about Runescape's fruits over the years. But recently it's become something I only post out of habit. I don't even play Runescape anymore and these threads are starting to feel like a chore. So, I would like to announce that this will be my final Runescape fruit thread. Maybe someone else will keep posting these going forwards but my heart just isn't in it a

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Friends, I'm sorry to announce that, after a long period of mental health strugg…
entry.content: Friends, I'm sorry to announce that, after a long period of mental health struggles and irl (in real life) difficulties, I simply do not have the time or energy to continue posting this rat's balls on [s4s]. Maybe one day in the future I can start it up again, but with the way the world is right now, there simply isn't any place on this board for me, this rat, or his balls. Genuinely, thank you to everyone who's supported me throughout these many years. It's meant the world to me and Katie. Keep

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8365 King Discussion Edition Edition Previous Thread: >>…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8365 King Discussion Edition Edition Previous Thread: >>83990205 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise

entry.title: /mu/ Music: CVllXXX
entry.content: What is this project? Seriously, what is it? It has: >an intentionally untypeable name >schizo-tier bilingual google doccy galore >unintelligible song names and lyrics. I don't even think she (it?) sings in a real language, or it's an obscure one >hundreds of tracks, ranging from dubstep to music-box horror-core >Made in Abyss meets Alien aesthetics >ONE SONG RELEASE A DAY FOR TWO YEARS Is this the product of AI or of a disturbed mind? or both? Where does genius become mental illness and vice ve

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >24yo shut-in khhv incel addicted to interracial and BNWO porn as a cope mechani…
entry.content: >24yo shut-in khhv incel addicted to interracial and BNWO porn as a cope mechanism Is this it? Is this the endgame? What’s really blackpilling is the fact that acceptance hurts, knowing that you need to give up on dreams such as getting a GF, being succesful and so on.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: What the fuck happened to breakcore?
entry.content: Ive been into breakcore for about 4 1/2 years at this point and im just pissed at the modern breakcore scene there are a few standout artists notability people like machine girl keeping shit somewhat fresh (even then they shifted to a weird electronic punk rock neish) but most of the traditional breakcore is gone to a degree i miss the days of the Venetian Snares 300 bpm breakcore breakdown or artists like alec empire and even old goreshit to an extent what the fuck happened to breakcore bros it

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: This world is shitty, I'll dedicate my life for the other world
entry.content: All religions are wrong, my belief is not even a religion because it's part of the nature, or universe. I have a soul, and it's my councioness. When I dream, I'm in an alternate world. My soul chose the wrong body, because I should be fair and delicate.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: what's the endgame of lain lifestyle?
entry.content: It seems to me that interest in "technology" above normie level, what we do here, without content to consume, is itself becoming just a consumption. >I will learn to code Ritchie and Thompson did their thing. Torvalds and Stallman did their thing. What the fuck the world could need more, beside some PLCs at your chicken tendies factory and cobol for crusty finance mainframes cunting your neetbux? Another react web app bullshit? Oh, you are more ambitious then that anon. Physics simulations in C?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I don't get why iPhone air bombed
entry.content: Thin light good screen size iOS it's what the normies always say they wanted but the normies all bought that giant heavy brick the iPhone Pro Max

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2985
entry.content: >Miko Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /news/ News: Graham Platner officially withdraws candidacy for US Senate in Maine
entry.content: Well fuck, I was looking forward to democrats voting in a nazi on their "Vote blue no matter who!" trend. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news /2026/jul/10/graham-platner-maine-s enate-officially-withdraws Graham Platner, the Democratic nominee for US Senate in Maine, officially withdrew his candidacy on Friday afternoon, ending a campaign laden with scandals. Maine’s secretary of state confirmed Platner had filed the paperwork to remove his name from the November ballot, two days after Platner p

entry.title: /mu/ Music: David Byrne: Songs From True Stories [Sire, 1986] It isn't all as archly mawkish…
entry.content: David Byrne: Songs From True Stories [Sire, 1986] It isn't all as archly mawkish as the rearranged dreamsongs from his group's worst album. Pretentiously dinky is more the prevailing mood--a soundtrack only, like so many arty soundtracks before it. One where Byrne, Meredith Monk, the Kronos Quartet, and some locals who couldn't have known what they were getting into do for Texas what Byrne & Eno did for Africa. C+

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IQ filter : the movie
entry.content: Above 100: The film is a satire on class biaised justice, the higher a character’s rank in the military hierarchy, the less he is held accountable for his failures. Below 100: The film was supposed to be a satire of a fascist society but it accidentally made fascism seem cool.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /hdgg/ - Human Domestication Guide General, 221st Bloom
entry.content: General for discussion of Human Domestication Guide & related fiction. creative asignment edition >What is HDG? HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity. Using their natural charisma and various classes of Xenodrugs, they aim to make Florets (d̶o̶c̶i̶l̶e̶,̶ ̶d̶r̶u̶g

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Can someone recommend me emotional(?) stuff?
entry.content: I'm an 18yo tranny, addicted to atmospheric metal genres since many years ago, and since some months ago I'm exploring goth music. Last sunday I celebrated my friend's birthday, drank a lot, vented to my friends about many things, primarily my step brother abusing me. It was a pretty girly thing, I liked it(the venting, not the abuse) Throughout this week I realized that my music taste derives from dissociation and it probably makes me depressed(it was pretty obvious but im retarded) I want to g

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Autom/o/tive Jugaad: Increase YOUR Izzat!
entry.content: This is the thread for sharing excellent automotive lifehacks and traffic bypass tips. >Brampton Turn: making a right on red only to whip a u-turn and make another right or go straight. They do the u-turn part in the intersection so it's just running the red light with extra steps. (Timmies and dalits are not welcome in this thread. Do NOT post if you are lower caste, bloody basterds.)

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: How did tracksuits, gold chains, trainers and caps become the face of Britain?
entry.content: This is the default/normal British lad. Gold chain, cap, tracksuit, and high-end Air trainers. The T-shirt and shorts of the UK. Along with it comes slang such as "peng", "swear down", "creps", "mush", and "wagwan". If you're in any urban area you will see this is the dominant style of lads from teens and the style often persists past middle age. The normal/default music taste is UKG, DnB, Jungle and Bassline. This has been the normal British getup for at least 20 odd years. How did it become th

entry.title: /o/ Auto: City fleet vs school bus fleet job
entry.content: I accepted an entry-level tech I position with a county's fleet management yesterday. I've heard being municipal fleet is a cherry spot to be if you're going to be a mechanic so I'm pretty content. Today I got an interview offer from my county's school district for a bus mechanic position I applied to earlier this week, which their shop is only 10 minutes away from where I live compared to an hour for the city fleet job. I already have a start date for the city fleet job, but the school district

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Pathologic man, Pathologic. It's like, I'm saving it. I just know at some point…
entry.content: >Pathologic man, Pathologic. It's like, I'm saving it. I just know at some point in my life as a man who's an empath, I'm really gonna NEED it, and I want it to be there for me. That's why I could only get through 20 minutes of it, but even in that 20 minutes, WOW is there a lot to dissect there. I could talk endlessly about it but I won't bore you with platitudes hahaha. So anyway, can I see your pussy?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: With most of the traffic online coming less and less from actual people, compani…
entry.content: With most of the traffic online coming less and less from actual people, companies are going to shit the bed if they rely on traditional ad revenue and paywalled content. With the revival of x402, companies will start switching to API dumps that just exist to feed info to LLMs and profit through the 402 transaction. It's not hard to see that the future of the internet will largely be humans interacting with chatbots for their latest content instead of directly visiting websites themselves.

entry.title: /int/ International: This is the coolest region of Turkey. It has the same climate with Southern Cana…
entry.content: This is the coolest region of Turkey. It has the same climate with Southern Canada which is Dfb(Warm-summer humid continental) and Dfc(Subarctic) in the highlands. Thoughts?
